incidents.detail: Late sliding challenge on Jonathan David down the right flank; the referee deems it excessive and shows yellow.
Strong two-footed engagement with Mbekezeli Mbokazi in the center of the pitch forces a turnover and earns a caution.
Rising unmarked above Sipho Chaine to meet Liam Millar's pinpoint cross from the right wing, David glances a firm header past Ronwen Williams into the far corner.
Cynical foul on Cyle Larin to halt a dangerous Canadian counter-attack; tactical yellow card prevents a potential scoring chance.
Dissent after questioning the referee's decision on a contested midfield challenge; caution issued for protesting the call.
Frustrated tackle on Joel Waterman as South Africa desperately searches for an equalizer in the dying moments of the match.
